text:
Shall be set when the requesting Nx_Port is requesting Common
Identification Data only (see table 61).

For Specific Indentification Data corresponding to a specific ULP (e.g., FC-
SB-3), shall be set to the FC-4 TYPE (see FC-FS-2) of that ULP.

Shall be used if the General Topology Discovery format (see 4.2.23.5) is to
be returned in the RNID Accept Payload.

Shall be used to indicate that Specific Node Identification Data in a vendor
specific format is to be returned.
